import{createClient}from'@supabase/supabase-js';const supabaseUrl=process.env.REACT_APP_SUPABASE_URL;const supabaseAnonKey=process.env.REACT_APP_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY;if(!supabaseUrl||!supabaseAnonKey){console.error('[NYTO] Missing Supabase env vars. '+'Check your .env file has REACT_APP_SUPABASE_URL and REACT_APP_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY set.');}export const supabase=createClient(supabaseUrl,supabaseAnonKey,{realtime:{params:{eventsPerSecond:10}}});// Venue ID from env — single-venue build
export const VENUE_ID=process.env.REACT_APP_VENUE_ID||'1234';
